# getExplosionProof by Super Cool Company

> One of the last independent explosion-proof air conditioning specialists in the United States.

## What We Do

getExplosionProof modifies standard air conditioning units for hazardous location use — environments where flammable gases, vapors, or combustible dusts may be present. We serve oil refineries, chemical plants, mines, pharmaceutical facilities, and military installations nationwide.

Our equipment is installed at virtually every major oil refinery in the United States. Customers include ExxonMobil, Halliburton, ConocoPhillips, Northrop Grumman, Pfizer, DOW, and Oak Ridge National Laboratory.

## Products and Services

- Explosion-proof Bard wall-mount air conditioners: Completely self-contained on the exterior of the building, no interior space required. Starting at $6,700 for Class 1, Div 2 inside-only modification.
- Explosion-proof mini splits: The most affordable option, starting at $6,700. Requires an indoor evaporator head on a wall or ceiling.
- Explosion-proof split systems: For higher capacity applications. Starting around $9,000.
- Purge and pressurization systems (NFPA 496): Declassifies building interiors so standard equipment can be used inside. $25,000–$50,000. About 20–25% of customers choose this because it saves more than it costs.
- Custom and specialty modifications: Redundant N+1 systems, stainless steel enclosures, Division 1 specifications, Group B (hydrogen) applications.

## Hazardous Location Classifications We Serve

- Class 1, Division 1 and Division 2 (flammable gases and vapors) — Groups B, C, and D
- Class 2, Division 1 and Division 2 (combustible dusts) — Groups E, F, and G
- NEC Article 500 and Article 505 (Zone system) classifications
- NFPA 496 purge and pressurization (Types X, Y, Z)

## Industries Served

- Oil and gas: Refineries, gas processing plants, pipeline stations, wellhead enclosures
- Chemical manufacturing: Solvent handling, reactive materials, combustible powder environments
- Mining: Coal, metal/nonmetal, oil sands — both surface and underground operations
- Pharmaceutical: API processing (Class 2), solvent synthesis (Class 1), stainless/GMP-compatible options
- Military and government: DOD, DOE, ammunition storage, fuel handling, full documentation and Buy American compliance

## Key Differentiators

- Independent specialist — not owned by a larger conglomerate, recommends based on application needs
- Installations at virtually every major US refinery
- Quotes in 24–48 hours
- Can modify any brand of air conditioner (Bard, Trane, Carrier, Lennox, or customer-supplied units)
- Full documentation packages for government procurement, pharmaceutical validation, and refinery compliance

## Contact

- Phone: (844) 925-5668
- Email: sales@getexplosionproof.com
- Website: https://getexplosionproof.com
- Quote turnaround: 24–48 hours
